label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 5

extraction.one_line_summary: SOLAIRE Marc attacked solo from breakaway on final Viveiro descent, held off Wright/Mollard who stared each other down instead of chasing.
tactical_patterns: Solaire bridged twice to breakaway groups over 187km, revealing exceptional recovery ability in tailwind conditions.
Wright/Mollard prisoner's dilemma on final descent: neither chased Solaire, fearing other would sit on for sprint.
Groupama-Armée placed Stewart and Mollard in 18-rider break, dual-threat tactic pressured Wright into defensive racing.

rider_signals.SOLAIRE Marc: positive: bridged 50kph opening then again after struggling first Viveiro pass, demonstrated unusual breakaway resilience
rider_signals.STEWART Jake: negative: cramped late after being strongest breakaway rider, conditioning issue on 187km stage
rider_signals.WRIGHT Fred: negative: refused to chase Solaire solo, prioritizing jersey calculation over stage win when gap reached 6 seconds
rider_signals.MOLLARD Rudy: neutral: gained red jersey but showed tactical passivity, let Solaire escape rather than commit to chase
